reforms.description: A proposal for a deposit scheme for large corporate firms was introduced, requiring 15 percent of profits above Kr. 1 million to be deposited with the Central Bank starting from January 1, 1975.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The impact on economic growth is uncertain as it may affect corporate liquidity and investment decisions.
reforms.status_evidence: Proposal of a deposit scheme for large corporate firms.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a new requirement for large firms but does not significantly alter the overall economic framework.
reforms.source_quote: December Proposal of a deposit scheme for large corporate firms. According to the proposal, 15 percent of profits above Kr. 1 million are to be deposited with the Central Bank as from 1st January 1975.
